description: Produces formatted legal documents in Word (.docx) from user-supplied content, handling document architecture and house style: multi-chain numbering, defined-terms conventions, structured recitals, and signature blocks. Covers agreements, corporate documents, litigation filings, memos, employment, policies, and correspondence, and can reformat existing .docx to a consistent style. Jurisdiction-agnostic; the user specifies the governing law.
author: Alessandro Dardano
